settings.title: An Intentional Writing Space
settings.description: see an issue? want to suggest a feature? visit us on github: <https://github.com/7368697061/ultra-lobster> this theme was made with 💖 by kneecaps.

settings.title: 🆂 Subtheme & Accent
settings.description: Pick your light & dark subtheme and accent. start here.

children.title: Custom Accent
children.description: select from hand-picked & theme-adjusted accent colors

settings.title: 🆃 Typography
settings.description: Fonts, headings, links, and text rendering.

children.title: UI Font
children.description: interface font: tabs, sidebars, menus, status bar. defaults to IBM Plex Sans. a system/interface font loaded in Appearance still overrides this.

children.title: Folder Font
children.description: typeface for folder names in the file explorer. leave empty to inherit the UI font.

children.title: Text Scale
children.description: 🚨 must be a whole / decimal number such as 1 or 1.1. further scale can be changed via slider in appearance

children.title: Accent Bold & Italic
children.description: applies distinct accent colors to bold and italic text

children.title: Serif Italic
children.description: renders italic text in a serif typeface

children.title: Italic Font
children.description: typeface used for em / italic text when Serif Italic is on (falls back to --font-serif if empty)

children.title: Disable Auto-Hyphenation
children.description: turns off automatic hyphenation on paragraphs (on by default)

children.title: Print / PDF: Show Link URLs
children.description: when printing or exporting to PDF, append the URL after external links

children.title: 📝 Inline Title
children.description: the note title shown above the editor.

children.title: Size
children.description: in em

children.title: Shimmer
children.description: animates the note title with a flowing accent-colour shimmer gradient

children.title: 🔡 Text Rendering
children.description: ligatures, small caps, superscript, and other OpenType features.

children.title: Tabular Numbers
children.description: all digits use tabular (monospace) figures across the whole note, good for data-heavy vaults

children.title: Stylistic Alternates
children.description: enables font-feature-settings: "ss01" for fonts that ship optical variants (Inter, Recursive, Fraunces)

children.title: Disable Ligatures
children.description: turns off common and contextual ligatures for maximum readability on dense code-heavy notes

children.title: Lilex Code Features
children.description: for code regions when the monospace font is Lilex: turns on coding ligatures (calt) + character variants (ss01, cv01, cv09, cv11, cv13). other mono fonts ignore variants they don't ship.

children.title: OpenType Superscript Footnotes
children.description: uses font-feature-settings: "sups" for native superscript numerals on footnote links

children.title: 📏 Measure & Line Width
children.description: how wide the text column runs.

children.title: Custom Line Width
children.description: apply opinionated line widths: 80ch editor, 68ch reading. override below.

children.title: Custom Body Weight
children.description: enable body font weight control (uses the slider below)

children.title: 🔗 Link Styles
children.description: how internal and external links look.

children.title: Internal Link Style
children.description: chip (default portal pill), underline, minimal (accent only), or dot-morph (accent dot → chip on hover)

children.title: External Link Style
children.description: underline (default), chip (dimmer tint than internal), minimal (accent only), or dot-morph

children.title: ⌨️ Headings
children.description: fonts, sizes, colours, underlines, markers, and folding for H1-H6.

children.title: 🔤 Heading Fonts
children.description: per-level typefaces, lc required for h2 to h6

children.title: 📐 Size & Weight
children.description: size preset, plus per-level sizes and font weights

children.title: Header Size Preset
children.description: size scale presets: opinionated uses a major-third scale, descending uses a minor-third, flat makes all headers the same size

children.title: H1 Size (em)
children.description: custom size in em units; active preset overrides this; clear the preset above to use custom sizes

children.title: H1 Weight
children.description: nightingale looks best at weight >500

children.title: 🎨 Colors
children.description: rainbow headers and per-level text color

children.title: 〰️ Underlines
children.description: global and per-level underline color, plus per-level on/off

children.title: Disable H2 Underline
children.description: removes the gradient underline from h2 headings

children.title: 🔖 Heading Markers
children.description: leading glyph before H1, borrowed from a subtheme

children.title: Leading Header Icon
children.description: adds a leading glyph before H1 headings, borrowed from an experimental subtheme. leave empty for none. anthos = flower, styx = star sigil, tau = hazard band

children.title: 📂 Fold & Wrap
children.description: fold indicator style and the text-wrap escape hatch

children.title: Teardrop Fold Indicator
children.description: enables the animated water-drop / circle fold indicator for headings; teardrop hangs point-up (open), morphs to a circle on collapse with physics animation.

children.title: Fold Indicator: Hover to Reveal
children.description: hide the fold indicator until you hover over a heading; works with both teardrop and the native obsidian indicator

children.title: Disable Balanced Heading Wrap
children.description: turns off text-wrap balance on headings

settings.title: 🅸 Interface & Style
settings.description: Window style: tabs, sidebar, status bar, and workspace.

children.title: 🗂️ Tabs & Title Bar
children.description: tab pills, active-tab style, and the floating view header

children.title: Floating View Header
children.description: the back/breadcrumb/action bar row floats over the note card instead of sitting above it, giving the note more vertical space

children.title: Floating Header // Hover to Reveal
children.description: when floating header is enabled, hides the bar until you hover over the note card (requires floating view header to be on)

children.title: Hide Tab Control Pill Borders
children.description: removes borders and background from the new-tab, tab-list, and sidebar toggle buttons at the edge of the tab bar

children.title: Stripped-Down Tab Bar
children.description: removes the background, border, and shadow from the main tab bar and flattens the active tab

children.title: 🌳 Sidebar & File Tree
children.description: folder icons and the file-tree collapse chevrons

children.title: Folder Icons
children.description: replaces the folder chevron with a custom folder glyph borrowed from one of the experimental subthemes. leave empty to keep the default chevron. when an experimental subtheme is active its own folder icons defer to your pick here

children.title: Glass Chevrons
children.description: replaces the default dot indicators with glass bubble chevrons

children.title: 📍 Status Bar
children.description: the bottom status bar: island pills, blur, and hover-to-reveal

children.title: Island Pill Status Bar
children.description: separates statusbar items into pills

children.title: Blur Status Bar Pills
children.description: blurs the background of the statusbar pill option

children.title: Status Bar: Hover to Reveal
children.description: hides the status bar until you hover near the bottom of the window

children.title: 🪟 Window & Workspace
children.description: global style: card style, radius, backgrounds, overlay blur, and motion

children.title: Flat Mode
children.description: removes glass, shadows, and borders for a flat minimal look

children.title: Content Card Border Style
children.description: border treatment for the main editor card: glass (default: solid background with inset bevel + ring like callout cards), asymmetric (the original gradient with two corners highlighted), or full border (symmetric highlight)

children.title: Halo Gradient
children.description: enable a wip background animation inspired by soft grainy gradients and angel numbers

children.title: New-Tab Empty State (Gradient + Lobster)
children.description: applies the "working edits" style empty state when no tabs are open

children.title: Enable Custom Workspace Background
children.description: works on any subtheme. for a local image or base64: drop ultra-lobster-bg.css (from theme snippets/) + your image into your obsidian snippets folder and enable the snippet. for a web url: paste below. both can be active; url field takes priority. (the Lunar Calcium plugin adds a vault-file/URL picker for this.)

children.title: Custom Background Web URL
children.description: takes priority over the snippet. paste a direct image link wrapped in url("https://..."). leave as 'none' to use the snippet instead.

children.title: Reduce Motion
children.description: disables all animations and transitions, for accessibility or preference. the OS-level prefers-reduced-motion setting is also respected automatically without this toggle

settings.title: 🅴 Editor & Reading
settings.description: Editing & reading surfaces: active line, lists, callouts, properties, marks.

children.title: ✏️ Active Line
children.description: active-line background, indicator, and popup

children.title: Active Line Indicator
children.description: Frame and Frame + Pluses use the HR Center Glyph (in the HR section) for their middle character

children.title: Active Line Popup Animation
children.description: adds a popup scale animation when switching lines (works with any active line highlight style)

children.title: 📋 Lists
children.description: bullet indicator and indent guides

children.title: List Bullet Indicator
children.description: shape of the unordered-list bullet. leave empty for the default glass pearl; other options borrow the protos square, styx tri-star, and anthos sprout (closed) / flower (open) folder glyphs

children.title: List Indent Guide Color
children.description: color of the vertical guide lines beside nested lists; applies in both reading and editing modes (default is theme-standard subtle border)

children.title: Indent Guide: Dashed
children.description: switch the indent guide line from solid to dashed in both reading and editing modes

children.title: 💬 Callouts & Code
children.description: callout and code block styling

children.title: 🏷️ Properties
children.description: properties card, key style, and tags

children.title: Properties Card
children.description: wraps the frontmatter properties block in a glass slab with inset value wells (off by default for a minimal layout)

children.title: Properties Key Style
children.description: key label treatment: blueprint is the minimal default (floating accent bar on hover), margin note adds a › pointer, underline reveal animates an accent line from center

children.title: Inline Title Above Properties
children.description: places the inline title above the properties block (Obsidian's native order). off by default, so the title sits below properties

children.title: Neon Glass Property Tags
children.description: restores the glowing accent-coloured pill style for multi-select property tags

children.title: Inline Property Tags
children.description: makes property tags look like standard inline wireframe tags

children.title: 🖍️ Highlights & Marks
children.description: highlight color and rough marker

children.title: Rough Marker Highlight
children.description: gives ==highlighted== text an organic hand-drawn marker edge via SVG displacement

children.title: Highlight Color
children.description: color of ==highlighted== text; also applies to the rough marker when enabled

children.title: ➖ Dividers
children.description: horizontal-rule glyph and color

children.title: HR Center Glyph
children.description: preset glyphs, when one is selected it overrides the custom field below (lc required)

options.label: 天で何かが待っている

children.title: Custom Glyph: type with quotes, e.g. "x" or "✦"
children.description: the quotes are required CSS syntax: "x" renders x, bare x renders nothing. leave the preset above empty for this to take effect. for multi-character glyphs used with the active-line Frame + Pluses indicator, use \A0 (CSS non-breaking space) instead of a regular space, e.g. "⌞\A0⌝"

children.title: HR Color
children.description: default is a slightly bumped contrast from the theme base

settings.title: 🅲 Canvas
settings.description: Canvas card styling and per-colour node looks.

children.title: 🃏 Cards
children.description: canvas card text alignment and blur

children.title: Center Canvas Text
children.description: center align text in canvas cards

children.title: Disable Canvas Blur
children.description: removes the backdrop-filter blur effect from canvas nodes

children.title: 🎨 Node Card Colors
children.description: per-accent-color canvas card styles and their borders

children.title: QuickAdd Input Style
children.description: box (default): subtle filled pill. underline: bare bottom border only. underline + gradient: bottom border with an accent gradient wash on focus

settings.title: 🅾 Subtheme Options
settings.description: Options that only apply when their matching subtheme is selected.

children.title: 🎨 Custom Palette
children.description: Active when the 🎨 custom dark or light subtheme is selected. All other subthemes ignore these settings.

children.title: ✦ Dark
children.description: dark-mode palette for the custom subtheme.

children.title: Background primary
children.description: Main workspace background

children.title: Background secondary
children.description: Sidebar and secondary panels

children.title: Text: muted
children.description: Secondary text, captions, labels

children.title: Text: faint
children.description: Very subdued text, placeholders, disabled

children.title: ✦ Light
children.description: light-mode palette for the custom subtheme.

children.title: Background primary
children.description: Main workspace background

children.title: Background secondary
children.description: Sidebar and secondary panels

children.title: Text: muted
children.description: Secondary text, captions, labels

children.title: Text: faint
children.description: Very subdued text, placeholders, disabled

children.title: τ Tau
children.description: Active when the τ tau subtheme is selected.

children.title: Extra Motion
children.description: animate H1-H4 hazard blocks, plus the hazard bands, chevron stack, and radar dial inside the empty-state HUD backdrop. ⚠️ adds continuous SMIL/CSS animation per visible heading + the empty-state pseudo; may noticeably slow scrolling in very long documents or on lower-power machines

children.title: ✿ Anthos
children.description: Active when the ✿ anthos subtheme is selected.

children.title: Extra Motion
children.description: subtle bloom sway, dot-twinkle on the vine motifs, slow drift on the dot-scatter burst, per-block smil twinkle on heading/file-tree/view-header halftone scatters, and a stamp-fade pulse on the empty-state seal. ⚠️ adds continuous SMIL animation across leaf decoration + block-mask pseudos; may noticeably slow scrolling on lower-power machines

children.title: Pastel Accent Tint
children.description: washes every paper surface and chrome area with a soft tint of your accent colour; always stays pastel regardless of chosen hue

children.title: Custom Active Line
children.description: draws the anthos wreath highlight on the active editor line. on by default; turn off (or pick a global Active Line option) to use a plain/standard active line instead

children.title: ✟ Styx
children.description: Active when the ✟ styx subtheme is selected.

children.title: Extra Motion
children.description: subtle wing flutter on the corner centerpiece, sparkle twinkle on the y2k decals, slow scanline drift, bleed-pulse on the active line, and a stamp-fade on the empty-state seal. ⚠️ adds continuous CSS animation across multiple pseudos; may noticeably slow scrolling on lower-power machines

children.title: Custom Active Line
children.description: draws the styx corner-glyph highlight on the active editor line. on by default; turn off (or pick a global Active Line option) to use a plain/standard active line instead

children.title: ☁ Nephele
children.description: Active when the ☁ nephele subtheme is selected.

children.title: Extra Motion
children.description: (reserved: motion choreography is deferred to a later phase) gel-shimmer sweeps on aqua buttons, breathing aqua-glaze on the active line, slow pinstripe drift on the view header, and press-flip on button :active. ⚠️ will add continuous CSS animation across multiple surfaces once enabled; may slow scrolling on lower-power machines

children.title: Accent Chrome
children.description: tint the active tabs, status bar, and vault switcher shelf in your accent colour (aqua gel) instead of porcelain grey

children.title: Start Menu Sidedock
children.description: restyle the entire left sidedock as an XP-style Start Menu: unified rounded card, gradient header strip, flat white body with bold application-launcher folders + gel pill hover/active, gradient footer strip across the vault profile. independent of Accent Chrome.

children.title: ▦ Protos
children.description: Active when the ▦ protos subtheme is selected.

children.title: Accent Surfaces
children.description: tint the fully-inked surfaces (active tab, selection wash, primary button, active file pill, links) with your accent colour instead of pure ink. dither tiles, strokes, and Chicago body text always stay 1-bit; the accent threads through binary call-outs only, never the bitmap layer. off by default to preserve the pure b/w signature.

children.title: Custom Active Line
children.description: draws the protos etched highlight on the active editor line. on by default; turn off (or pick a global Active Line option) to use a plain/standard active line instead

settings.title: ❔ Help & Reference
settings.description: quick reference for spans, per-note classes, callouts, and task icons

children.title: Inline Spans & Marks
children.description: Use `` or `` directly in note body (works in reading view): `full paragraph text here` → large drop cap on the first letter; remaining text flows normally `text` → small caps (requires a font with OpenType `smcp` glyphs) `hidden text` → hidden behind a bar until hovered; works across multiple lines `==highlighted text==` uses the global highlight color set in Style Settings. For per-mark color overrides use `text`: `ulu-r` red   `ulu-g` green   `ulu-b` blue   `ulu-p` purple   `ulu-o` orange   `ulu-y` yellow

children.title: Per-note CSS Classes
children.description:
Add to a note's frontmatter to apply only to that note:
```
---
cssclasses: [ulu-justify, ulu-accent-title]
---
```
`ulu-justify`: justified paragraph text with auto-hyphenation

`ulu-accent-title`: accent-coloured inline note title

`ulu-minimal-properties`: strips slab/border/shadow from the properties block

children.title: Callouts
children.description:
**Multi-column layout**: use `[!col]` with `>>` nested callouts as columns:
```
> [!col]
>> First column content here.
>
>> Second column content here.
```
Use `[!col-strip]` as a column type to remove all chrome from its contents.

children.title: Task List Icons
children.description:
Custom task types replace the standard checkbox with a coloured icon:

`- [!]` red alert   `- [?]` orange question   `- [i]` blue info
`- [*]` purple star   `- [+]` green add   `- [-]` grey cancelled
`- [b]` orange bookmark   `- ["]` grey quote   `- [l]` red pin

children.title: ⬡ Multi-column
children.description: Use [!col] with nested >> callouts as columns. Use [!col-strip] as a column to remove chrome from its contents.
